job: turn a creator capsule into a reproducible p5.js motion sketch contract with a fixed preview board, frame probes, public input boundary, and remix handles before any raw renderer output is saved

p5_adapter.runtime_boundary: DASH owns deterministic motion contracts and frame probes; the consuming creator project owns the p5 runtime, canvas loop, export codec, and any final rendered media.

sketch_contract.motion_budget: reuse dash-flow-field motion budget; exactly one layer may breathe or flow strongly so the sketch stays editorial instead of becoming a screensaver
sketch_contract.data_policy: synthetic seed only; no image, audio, video, API stream, private benchmark, local path, or account screenshot enters the sketch
render_steps: generate deterministic flow vectors from the public seed
trace frame probes for the selected timeline phases
inspect the fixed preview board before any external p5 render

blocked: raw generated image, video, or audio output
API keys, cookies, tokens, passwords, or provider logs
account screenshots, client analytics, or private benchmark evidence

retention: selected p5 frontier-adapter mutation retained as example plus script and CI gate; do not promote more p5 package primitives until at least two creator capsule adapters prove the same seed-to-proof contract
